# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
#####################################
# Public Health (always-available free tree)
#####################################
vaccination_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions
	icon = scientific_revolution_advance

	global_life_expectancy = 4
	global_disease_resistance = 0.07

	depth = 0
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

# Enlightenment
#####################################

	age = age_6_revolutions
	icon = enlightenment_advance
		
	tolerance_heretic = 1
	tolerance_heathen = 1
	depth = 0
	
	allow = { has_embraced_institution = institution:enlightenment }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}
